title: Trapping, hunting, or fishing on preserve
doc_html:
§753.  Trapping, hunting, or fishing on preserve

No person shall trap, hunt, or fish on the preserve except under such rules and regulations as are made by the commissioner.
doc_text:
§753.  Trapping, hunting, or fishing on preserve
No person shall trap, hunt, or fish on the preserve except under such rules and regulations as are made by the commissioner.
